args.code:
import json
import pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime

# Load case data from file
case_file_path = var_functions.query_db:9
df_cases = pd.read_json(case_file_path)

# Load account data
accounts_data = var_functions.query_db:10
df_accounts = pd.DataFrame(accounts_data)

# Data cleaning
# Remove leading # from IDs
df_cases['accountid_clean'] = df_cases['accountid'].str.replace('#', '', regex=False)
df_accounts['Id_clean'] = df_accounts['Id'].str.replace('#', '', regex=False)

# Remove trailing whitespace from status
df_cases['status_clean'] = df_cases['status'].str.strip()

# Filter for closed cases only
df_cases = df_cases[df_cases['status_clean'] == 'Closed'].copy()

# Convert dates to datetime
df_cases['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_cases['createddate'])
df_cases['closeddate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_cases['closeddate'])

# Filter for past 6 quarters from 2022-10-26
end_date = pd.to_datetime('2022-10-26')
start_date = pd.to_datetime('2021-04-26')  # 18 months back

df_cases_filtered = df_cases[
    (df_cases['closeddate'] >= start_date) & 
    (df_cases['closeddate'] <= end_date)
].copy()

# Join with accounts to get states
df_merged = df_cases_filtered.merge(
    df_accounts[['Id_clean', 'ShippingState']],
    left_on='accountid_clean',
    right_on='Id_clean',
    how='inner'
)

# Clean state column (remove trailing whitespace)
df_merged['ShippingState_clean'] = df_merged['ShippingState'].str.strip()

# Calculate closure time in hours
df_merged['closure_hours'] = (df_merged['closeddate'] - df_merged['createddate']).dt.total_seconds() / 3600

# Group by state and calculate average closure time
state_stats = df_merged.groupby('ShippingState_clean').agg({
    'closure_hours': ['mean', 'count']
}).round(2)

state_stats.columns = ['avg_closure_hours', 'case_count']
state_stats = state_stats.reset_index()

# Filter states with at least 5 cases to ensure meaningful results
state_stats_filtered = state_stats[state_stats['case_count'] >= 5].copy()

# Sort by average closure time
state_stats_sorted = state_stats_filtered.sort_values('avg_closure_hours')

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(state_stats_sorted.head(10).to_dict('records')))

args.code:
import json
import pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime

# Load case data from file
case_file_path = locals()['var_functions.query_db:9']
with open(case_file_path, 'r') as f:
    cases_data = json.load(f)

df_cases = pd.DataFrame(cases_data)

# Load account data
accounts_data = locals()['var_functions.query_db:10']
df_accounts = pd.DataFrame(accounts_data)

# Data cleaning
# Remove leading # from IDs
df_cases['accountid_clean'] = df_cases['accountid'].str.replace('#', '', regex=False)
df_accounts['Id_clean'] = df_accounts['Id'].str.replace('#', '', regex=False)

# Remove trailing whitespace from status
df_cases['status_clean'] = df_cases['status'].str.strip()

# Filter for closed cases only
df_cases = df_cases[df_cases['status_clean'] == 'Closed'].copy()

# Convert dates to datetime
df_cases['createddate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_cases['createddate'])
df_cases['closeddate'] = pd.to_datetime(df_cases['closeddate'])

# Filter for past 6 quarters from 2022-10-26
# 6 quarters = 18 months
end_date = pd.to_datetime('2022-10-26')
start_date = pd.to_datetime('2021-04-26')  # 18 months back

df_cases_filtered = df_cases[
    (df_cases['closeddate'] >= start_date) & 
    (df_cases['closeddate'] <= end_date)
].copy()

# Join with accounts to get states
df_merged = df_cases_filtered.merge(
    df_accounts[['Id_clean', 'ShippingState']],
    left_on='accountid_clean',
    right_on='Id_clean',
    how='inner'
)

# Clean state column (remove trailing whitespace)
df_merged['ShippingState_clean'] = df_merged['ShippingState'].str.strip()

# Calculate closure time in hours
df_merged['closure_hours'] = (df_merged['closeddate'] - df_merged['createddate']).dt.total_seconds() / 3600

# Group by state and calculate average closure time
state_stats = df_merged.groupby('ShippingState_clean').agg({
    'closure_hours': ['mean', 'count']
}).round(2)

state_stats.columns = ['avg_closure_hours', 'case_count']
state_stats = state_stats.reset_index()

# Filter states with at least 5 cases to ensure meaningful results
state_stats_filtered = state_stats[state_stats['case_count'] >= 3].copy()

# Sort by average closure time (quickest first)
state_stats_sorted = state_stats_filtered.sort_values('avg_closure_hours')

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(state_stats_sorted.head(10).to_dict('records')))

args.code:
import json
import pandas as pd
from datetime import datetime
import re

# Load case data from file
case_file_path = locals()['var_functions.query_db:9']
with open(case_file_path, 'r') as f:
    cases_data = json.load(f)

df_cases = pd.DataFrame(cases_data)

# Load account data
accounts_data = locals()['var_functions.query_db:10']
df_accounts = pd.DataFrame(accounts_data)

# Data cleaning
# Remove leading # from IDs
df_cases['accountid_clean'] = df_cases['accountid'].str.replace('#', '', regex=False)
df_accounts['Id_clean'] = df_accounts['Id'].str.replace('#', '', regex=False)

# Remove trailing whitespace from status
df_cases['status_clean'] = df_cases['status'].str.strip()

# Filter for closed cases only
df_cases = df_cases[df_cases['status_clean'] == 'Closed'].copy()

# Convert dates to datetime (remove timezone info first)
for col in ['createddate', 'closeddate']:
    df_cases[col] = df_cases[col].str.replace(r'\.\d{3}\+\d{4}$', '', regex=True)
    df_cases[col] = pd.to_datetime(df_cases[col])

# Filter for past 6 quarters from 2022-10-26
# 6 quarters = 18 months
end_date = pd.to_datetime('2022-10-26')
start_date = pd.to_datetime('2021-04-26')  # 18 months back

df_cases_filtered = df_cases[
    (df_cases['closeddate'] >= start_date) & 
    (df_cases['closeddate'] <= end_date)
].copy()

# Join with accounts to get states
df_merged = df_cases_filtered.merge(
    df_accounts[['Id_clean', 'ShippingState']],
    left_on='accountid_clean',
    right_on='Id_clean',
    how='inner'
)

# Clean state column (remove trailing whitespace)
df_merged['ShippingState_clean'] = df_merged['ShippingState'].str.strip()

# Calculate closure time in hours
df_merged['closure_hours'] = (df_merged['closeddate'] - df_merged['createddate']).dt.total_seconds() / 3600

# Group by state and calculate average closure time
state_stats = df_merged.groupby('ShippingState_clean').agg({
    'closure_hours': ['mean', 'count']
}).round(2)

state_stats.columns = ['avg_closure_hours', 'case_count']
state_stats = state_stats.reset_index()

# Filter states with at least 5 cases to ensure meaningful results
state_stats_filtered = state_stats[state_stats['case_count'] >= 3].copy()

# Sort by average closure time (quickest first)
state_stats_sorted = state_stats_filtered.sort_values('avg_closure_hours')

top_states = state_stats_sorted.head(10).to_dict('records')

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(top_states))

# 6 quarters = 18 months
end_date = pd.to_datetime('2022-10-26')
start_date = pd.to_datetime('2021-04-26')  # 18 months back

df_cases_filtered = df_cases[
    (df_cases['closeddate'] >= start_date) & 
    (df_cases['closeddate'] <= end_date)
].copy()

# Join with accounts to get states
df_merged = df_cases_filtered.merge(
    df_accounts[['Id_clean', 'ShippingState']],
    left_on='accountid_clean',
    right_on='Id_clean',
    how='inner'
)

# Clean state column (remove trailing whitespace)
df_merged['ShippingState_clean'] = df_merged['ShippingState'].str.strip()

# Calculate closure time in hours
df_merged['closure_hours'] = (df_merged['closeddate'] - df_merged['createddate']).dt.total_seconds() / 3600

# Group by state and calculate average closure time
state_stats = df_merged.groupby('ShippingState_clean').agg({
    'closure_hours': ['mean', 'count']
}).round(2)

state_stats.columns = ['avg_closure_hours', 'case_count']
state_stats = state_stats.reset_index()

# Filter states with at least 5 cases to ensure meaningful results
state_stats_filtered = state_stats[state_stats['case_count'] >= 3].copy()

# Sort by average closure time (quickest first)
state_stats_sorted = state_stats_filtered.sort_values('avg_closure_hours')

top_states = state_stats_sorted.head(10).to_dict('records')

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(top_states))

import json
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

# Reload data to verify results
case_file_path = locals()['var_functions.query_db:9']
with open(case_file_path, 'r') as f:
    cases_data = json.load(f)
df_cases = pd.DataFrame(cases_data)

# Load account data
accounts_data = locals()['var_functions.query_db:10']
df_accounts = pd.DataFrame(accounts_data)

# Find all states and their case counts to ensure we have complete picture
df_cases['accountid_clean'] = df_cases['accountid'].str.replace('#', '', regex=False)
df_accounts['Id_clean'] = df_accounts['Id'].str.replace('#', '', regex=False)

df_cases['status_clean'] = df_cases['status'].str.strip()
df_cases = df_cases[df_cases['status_clean'] == 'Closed'].copy()

# Convert dates
for col in ['createddate', 'closeddate']:
    df_cases[col] = df_cases[col].str.replace(r'\.\d{3}\+\d{4}$', '', regex=True)
    df_cases[col] = pd.to_datetime(df_cases[col])

# Filter date range
end_date = pd.to_datetime('2022-10-26')
start_date = pd.to_datetime('2021-04-26')

df_cases_filtered = df_cases[
    (df_cases['closeddate'] >= start_date) & 
    (df_cases['closeddate'] <= end_date)
].copy()

# Join with accounts
df_merged = df_cases_filtered.merge(
    df_accounts[['Id_clean', 'ShippingState']],
    left_on='accountid_clean',
    right_on='Id_clean',
    how='inner'
)

df_merged['ShippingState_clean'] = df_merged['ShippingState'].str.strip()
df_merged['closure_hours'] = (df_merged['closeddate'] - df_merged['createddate']).dt.total_seconds() / 3600

# Get all state stats
all_state_stats = df_merged.groupby('ShippingState_clean').agg({
    'closure_hours': ['mean', 'count', 'std']
})
all_state_stats.columns = ['avg_closure_hours', 'case_count', 'std_closure_hours']
all_state_stats = all_state_stats.reset_index()

# Fill NaN std with 0
all_state_stats['std_closure_hours'] = all_state_stats['std_closure_hours'].fillna(0)

# Only keep states with at least 3 cases
all_state_stats_valid = all_state_stats[all_state_stats['case_count'] >= 3].copy()
all_state_stats_valid = all_state_stats_valid.sort_values('avg_closure_hours')

print('__RESULT__:')
result = {
    'top_state': all_state_stats_valid.iloc[0]['ShippingState_clean'] if len(all_state_stats_valid) > 0 else None,
    'state_stats': all_state_stats_valid.to_dict('records'),
    'total_states_analyzed': len(all_state_stats_valid)
}
print(json.dumps(result))

# Reload data to verify results

    cases_data = json.load(f)
df_cases = pd.DataFrame(cases_data)

# Load account data

# Find all states and their case counts to ensure we have complete picture
df_cases['accountid_clean'] = df_cases['accountid'].str.replace('#', '', regex=False)

df_cases['status_clean'] = df_cases['status'].str.strip()
df_cases = df_cases[df_cases['status_clean'] == 'Closed'].copy()

# Convert dates
for col in ['createddate', 'closeddate']:

    df_cases[col] = pd.to_datetime(df_cases[col])

# Filter date range

    (df_cases['closeddate'] >= start_date) &

].copy()

# Join with accounts

# Get all state stats
